'''Kattadan Guards''' were the planet [[Kattada/Legends|Kattada's]] primary defense force. They wore blue body armor and were armed with [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. They were lightly armed since Kattada was a peaceful planet.

Members of the organization served Kattada's ruler [[Madam]] [[Mia Ikova]] as her personal body guards in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]. During the [[Battle of Kattada]], Kattadan guards fought alongside [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces from [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa's]] transport [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']] against an Imperial patrol under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Karg]] sent to arrest Organa.
